Home / Art Gallery / Interior Ensembles
Collection 07

Interior Ensembles

“A work of art does not end at the frame—it continues into the space around it.”

The Interior Ensembles of contemporary artist Nona Dronova represent complete artistic environments in which painting, textile art and handcrafted design are conceived as a single work of art. Rather than existing as separate objects, each element is created simultaneously, united by a common visual concept, colour palette and decorative rhythm.

The ensemble “The Wedding of Peacocks” is one of the most distinctive projects in the collection. A series of vertically arranged hand-crocheted textile panels, created from richly coloured yarns, forms the visual foundation of the composition. The same circular motifs continue in hand-crocheted pouffes and are echoed once again in a large oil painting on canvas. Repeating forms, colours and rhythms move naturally from textile to painting and into the surrounding space, creating a unified artistic environment.

For Nona Dronova, an interior ensemble is not a decorative arrangement but a contemporary work of interdisciplinary art. Painting, textiles and functional objects become equal artistic media, connected through a shared visual language. The result is a harmonious spatial composition in which every element supports the others, transforming the interior into an immersive artistic experience.

“The most complete work of art is the one you can live inside.”
